name: The Miskatonic Museum
intro_text: Dr. Armitage believes that a copy of the Necronomicon held in Miskatonic University's museum may hold the key to stopping what is coming. The museum is closed for the evening, but that cannot stop you.
Something else is in the museum tonight. The Hunting Horror — a creature of impossible angles and writhing darkness — has been drawn here, and it will not let you leave with the tome.
setup_instructions: Set aside the Hunting Horror (02141). It enters play when the exhibit halls are disturbed.
The Necronomicon is placed face-down in one of the exhibit halls — place it randomly.
Investigators begin at the Museum Entrance.
The museum is closed; all inner locations start hidden.

R1.label: Resolution 1 — The Necronomicon is secured
text: You find the Necronomicon and escape the museum before the Hunting Horror can claim you. The tome is dangerous in your hands — but far more dangerous in the wrong ones.
Record in the campaign log: *The investigators have the Necronomicon.* Add it to the campaign log as a key item. Each investigator earns 2 bonus XP.

R2.label: Resolution 2 — The tome is lost
text: The Hunting Horror prevents you from reaching the Necronomicon. You escape with your lives, but the tome remains in the museum — and the creature now guards it.
Record in the campaign log: *The Necronomicon remains at the museum.*

defeat.label: Defeat — Consumed by the dark
text: The Hunting Horror pursues you through the galleries. When you finally escape, you are not sure all of you made it out intact.
Record in the campaign log: *The investigators were defeated at the Miskatonic Museum.*
